languages.text: "Насколько мне известно, упомянутая госпожой Таллар обитель находится в системе Фурибундус. Ее обитатели не слишком расположены к коммуникации с мирянами, но я готов задействовать все имеющиеся у меня дипломатические связи, чтобы добиться аудиенции у духовенства монастыря".

"To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."
languages.original_text: "Насколько мне известно, упомянутая госпожой Таллар обитель находится в системе Фурибундус. Ее обитатели не слишком расположены к коммуникации с мирянами, но я готов задействовать все имеющиеся у меня дипломатические связи, чтобы добиться аудиенции у духовенства монастыря".

traits.locale_text: "To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

"To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

"To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

languages.text: « En l'état actuel de mes connaissances, le cloître auquel se réfère maîtresse Tallar se situe dans le système de Furibundus. Ses habitants répugnent à s'adresser aux profanes, mais j'épuiserai tous les recours diplomatiques dont je dispose afin d'obtenir une audience auprès du clergé de la station. »
languages.original_text: "To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

traits.locale_text: « En l'état actuel de mes connaissances, le cloître auquel se réfère maîtresse Tallar se situe dans le système de Furibundus. Ses habitants répugnent à s'adresser aux profanes, mais j'épuiserai tous les recours diplomatiques dont je dispose afin d'obtenir une audience auprès du clergé de la station. »

languages.text: "Meines Wissens befindet sich das Kloster, auf das sich Meisterin Tallar bezieht, im Furibundus-System. Seine Bewohner meiden die Kommunikation mit Laien, aber ich bin bereit, meine diplomatischen Verbindungen spielen zu lassen, um eine Audienz mit der Priesterschaft der Station zu erhalten."
languages.original_text: "To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

traits.locale_text: "Meines Wissens befindet sich das Kloster, auf das sich Meisterin Tallar bezieht, im Furibundus-System. Seine Bewohner meiden die Kommunikation mit Laien, aber ich bin bereit, meine diplomatischen Verbindungen spielen zu lassen, um eine Audienz mit der Priesterschaft der Station zu erhalten."

languages.text: “据我所知，塔拉女士提到的那所修道院位于怒焰星系。那里的居民向来不愿与教外人往来，但我愿动用自己所有外交人脉，争取与该星站神职人员会面的机会。”
languages.original_text: "To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

traits.locale_text: “据我所知，塔拉女士提到的那所修道院位于怒焰星系。那里的居民向来不愿与教外人往来，但我愿动用自己所有外交人脉，争取与该星站神职人员会面的机会。”

languages.text: «Hasta donde sé, el claustro al que se refiere la maestra Tallar está en el sistema Furibundus. Sus habitantes son poco propensos a comunicarse con los laicos, pero estoy dispuesto a emplear todos mis contactos diplomáticos para obtener una audiencia con el clero de la estación».
languages.original_text: "To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

traits.locale_text: «Hasta donde sé, el claustro al que se refiere la maestra Tallar está en el sistema Furibundus. Sus habitantes son poco propensos a comunicarse con los laicos, pero estoy dispuesto a emplear todos mis contactos diplomáticos para obtener una audiencia con el clero de la estación».

languages.text: "Bildiğim kadarıyla Üstat Tallar'ın bahsettiği manastır, Furibundus Sistemi'nde bulunuyor. Sakinleri ruhban olmayanlarla iletişim kurmaya pek niyetli olmasa da istasyonun ruhban sınıfıyla bir görüşme ayarlamak için elimdeki tüm diplomatik bağlantıları kullanmaya hazırım."
languages.original_text: "To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

traits.locale_text: "Bildiğim kadarıyla Üstat Tallar'ın bahsettiği manastır, Furibundus Sistemi'nde bulunuyor. Sakinleri ruhban olmayanlarla iletişim kurmaya pek niyetli olmasa da istasyonun ruhban sınıfıyla bir görüşme ayarlamak için elimdeki tüm diplomatik bağlantıları kullanmaya hazırım."

languages.text: 「私の知る限り、タルラールが言及している回廊はフレイバス・システムにあります。その住民は一般の人たちとコミュニケーションをとることに好意を示さないのですが、私は、この駅にいる神職たちと面会するために、私が持つすべての外交的関係を駆使する用意があります。」
languages.original_text: "To the best of my knowledge, the cloister Mistress Tallar is referring to is located in the Furibundus System. Its denizens are not well disposed to communicating with the laity, but I am willing to leverage every diplomatic connection I possess to gain an audience with the station's clergy."

traits.locale_text: 「私の知る限り、タルラールが言及している回廊はフレイバス・システムにあります。その住民は一般の人たちとコミュニケーションをとることに好意を示さないのですが、私は、この駅にいる神職たちと面会するために、私が持つすべての外交的関係を駆使する用意があります。」
